LoungeLens

every lounge your cards actually open — airport + railway

Where are you flying?

Tell me your cities. I'll show exactly which lounges you can walk into, and which card to flash at each one.

🏠
Your cards
Reality check: India reworked lounge rules across 2024-25 and they shift every quarter. Each entry shows a confidence badge. Green = a card of yours opens it now. Amber = you have a card but a spend gate or empty quota blocks it.

Which card should you get?

Ranked by new lounges it unlocks for you, how easy it is to get, and how fast it arrives — important if you're applying before a trip.

Tap the cards you hold

Saved only in this browser. Nothing leaves your device, ever.

How much should you trust this?

This app knows its own data goes stale. Here it checks itself, ages its confidence, learns from what actually happened to you, and tells you what to re-verify before you fly.

Honest scope: LoungeLens is a free, private app with no server, so it can't browse the live internet by itself (your browser blocks that, and there's nothing running when the tab is closed). What it CAN do, and does below: track data age, audit itself, learn from your logged visits, and queue what needs a human check. Real-time auto-research needs a paid backend — see the roadmap at the bottom.
🔁 Verify before you fly

Ranked by urgency: things your own experience contradicted, then items on your trip, then the stalest / least certain.

🧪 Self-audit (the app checking its own data)
📥 Community data (share corrections)

Export your logged experiences to share with friends, or import theirs. This is how the data improves without a server.

🪜 The roadmap to real-time (honest)

About LoungeLens

A free, private tool to see which lounges your credit cards actually open in India.

⚠️ Not financial advice

LoungeLens helps you understand lounge access. It does not recommend taking on debt and is not affiliated with any bank, card issuer, DreamFolks, Priority Pass, or any lounge operator. Card and lounge rules in India change often. Always confirm the current terms with your bank and at the lounge desk before you rely on access. Apply for credit cards responsibly.

🔒 Your privacy

Everything you enter — your cards, your visits, your trips — is stored only in your own browser (localStorage). It is never sent to any server. There is no account, no login, no tracking, no analytics, no cookies. If you clear your browser data, it's gone. If you open the app on another device, it starts fresh. You can export your data to a file any time from the Data Health tab.

📊 Where the data comes from

The card and lounge information is compiled and confidence-tagged by the maintainer, last reviewed on the date shown in the footer. It is directionally accurate but not guaranteed current. Each entry carries a confidence badge and a "verify" pointer. The app ages its own confidence over time and flags what to re-check. Treat it as a smart starting point, not the final word.

💬 Found something wrong?

Lounge access changed? A card's benefit is different now? Log your real experience in the Lounges tab (got in / refused) — that feeds the verify queue and, if you export and share the file, helps everyone using the app. That's how the data stays honest without a server.

Version

—

🛋️

Welcome to LoungeLens

Three quick things:

  1. Add the cards you hold — tap them once, saved on this device.
  2. Plan a trip — type your cities, see exactly which lounge each card opens.
  3. Before you fly — glance at Data Health to see what to double-check.

Free. Private. Nothing leaves your device. Not financial advice.

· Saved on this device only · reset
